Introduction xxiii
The ceremony of consecration and installation of idols1 is
very interesting and significant in that it has great esoteric meaning.
The Deity is treated like a new-born child or a king in respect of
sleep, food, clothing, etc.2 In Verse 19 Varaha states that the
Magas are the accredited priests for installing the Sun's images-
Physiognomy and Palmistry are treated of in three chapters,
LXVIII-LXX. In the first he speaks of thirteen elements in the case
of men for predicting their past and future. The knower of this Science
is cnWed Samudravid. This lore is known as Sdmudrika Sdstra. It is held
by some that Sarnudra means Lord Visnu, while by others, Siva. It
may also be the name of a class of writers on this subject. It is the
name of a work quoted by Padmandbka.
